emails.subject: Re: PPL Electric Utilties Corporation
emails.body: Hi Tana, I didn't know if I forwarded this to you or not, but they are indeed marking up the financial deals Would you like for me to forward them to you? Thanks David Forwarded by David P Dupre/HOU/ECT on 06/15/2000 10:38 AM From: Larry Joe Hunter 06/02/2000 08:04 AM

emails.subject: Re: PPL Electric Utilties Corporation
emails.body: You need to contact whoever it is you are speaking to at PPL and tell them we have never received a request to assign the financial deals, and if they would like to send us one we will take a look at it. David P Dupre 06/15/2000 10:40 AM
